name: Port Nyanzaru
politics: Merchant princes rule through wealth, favours and private guards.
Foreign adventurers are welcomed for coin but watched closely.
The Flaming Fist influence supply lines but do not rule the city.
culture: Colour, noise, spice and trade dominate daily life.
Guides are respected but can be dangerous investments.
Dinosaur racing is entertainment, gambling, status and chaos rolled together.
rumours: A guide knows a safe route nobody else admits exists.
A merchant prince is paying quietly for relics from the interior.
People disappear near the old city walls after midnight.
dmSecrets: A friendly contact may be testing the party for a faction.
A harmless market rumour points toward the idol legend.
A yuan-ti spy has already noticed unusual newcomers.
